name: io.github.chrischall/creditkarma-mcp
description: Credit Karma transactions for Claude — spending by category, merchant, and account summary

environmentVariables.name: CK_COOKIES
environmentVariables.description: The Cookie header from a signed-in creditkarma.com request. Run `npm run auth` to capture via browser login, or copy from DevTools → Network → any creditkarma.com request → Request Headers.
